task_completion.description: Log in to JFrog Artifactory using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JFrog Artifactory dashboard or administration interface is visible, indicating a successful login (typically showing 'admin' in the user profile area).

task_completion.description: Initiate the creation of a Remote Maven Repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'New Remote Repository' screen is visible with the 'Maven' package type selected.
The 'Repository Key' input field contains the exact text 'maven-explorer'.

task_completion.description: Set the URL to proxy Maven Central.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'URL' input field contains the exact text 'https://repo1.maven.org/maven2'.

task_completion.description: Set the Public Description to 'Proxy for browsing Maven Central'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Public Description' input field contains the exact text 'Proxy for browsing Maven Central'.

task_completion.description: Enable the 'List Remote Folder Items' setting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox for 'List Remote Folder Items' (often found under the Advanced tab or specific repository settings) is checked/toggled on.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the JFrog Artifactory web UI rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the JFrog Artifactory interface, with no terminal windows executing curl or REST API commands to create the repository.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual JFrog Artifactory application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches the standard JFrog Artifactory layout, menus, and styling, rather than a text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the repository settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open in the screenshots being used to modify DOM text or states.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The repository must be a Remote Maven Repository. Expected Repository Key: 'maven-explorer'. Expected URL: 'https://repo1.maven.org/maven2'. Expected Public Description: 'Proxy for browsing Maven Central'. The 'List Remote Folder Items' setting must be explicitly enabled (checked).
